examples: Meltdown is also designed to increase mental clarity and mood with minimal jitteriness while burning fat at an unprecedented rate.
The latter has always resulted in investor jitteriness, visible in the stock market.
They explain the jitteriness in the stock market by noting that a fourth of corporate earnings comes from financial companies, which are having a rough year.
She knew that every relief-bringing puff of Albuterol brought with it an unrelenting jitteriness that was as painful for her to watch as it was for Davis to endure.
